puzzleDescription: Learn how to use division (/) to get hours and the modulo operator (%) to get the remaining minutes from a total number of minutes.
objective: Convert minutes into hours and remaining minutes.
hints: Divide the total minutes by 60 to get the hours (int hours = total / 60;).
Use the % operator to get the leftover minutes (int mins = total % 60;).
Print it in this format: hours + " hours and " + mins + " minutes"
